eval_data: PHINO training data (multi-material, full trajectory MSE similarity)
notes: PHINO uses 1536d features (CLS + mean pool), DINOv2 uses 768d (CLS only)
Bug fixes applied: full trajectory MSE (not last frame), fixed soft labels, WiSE-FT dtype
Absolute R² values lower than V1 due to different eval data (multi-material vs deterministic mapping)
